items.title: Removed duplicate list name from app bar
items.description: List name already shown in header below — removing it from AppBar fixes truncation and gives actions more space.

items.title: Circular progress in list header
items.description: Replaced linear progress bar with animated circular ring — header is now a single compact row.

items.title: Compact list header
items.description: Reduced header size to show more items — sharing status moved to app bar, tighter spacing.
